art.title: Art
intro_paragraphs: While I was studying dentistry, I wanted to understand the human body mechanically rather than just memorizing it. To better learn anatomy during my dentistry studies, I drew detailed anatomical and biological sketches.
At the same time, I also draw caricatures that give social messages to people.
I regularly share my artwork on my Instagram page delusional.myz.

captures.intro: Welcome to my photography collection. These are moments I've captured during my travels and experiences. Click on any photo to view it in full size.
